"'''Droidworks Assault'''" is a three-part set of scenarios for the ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'' game, written by [[Sterling Hershey]] and published in [[2005]]. It depicts a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] attack on the [[TransTech Droidworks/Legends|TransTech Droidworks]] factory.
